query:
You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.175 (commit: 3f67d1d8).

## Issue to Resolve

Add option to Redo Answer Card
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Sometimes, I accidentally click on the Undo button in the reviewer, which undoes the rating of the last card I reviewed.
This happens especially when I am editing a particular card during review because the location of the ✓ button of the edit note window coincides with the location of the undo button.

Because AnkiDroid doesn't have the Redo button, I have to rethink which answer button should be used for rating that card.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
This problem can be solved by adding a Redo option, just like Desktop Anki has.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Really liked the feature request. I'd try to implement it  
I've been working a bit on implementing this feature and had some questions for other contributers. Would a redo button like this also stay active while the whiteboard is up to redo strokes? I believe that would make the most sense, but I want to see if anyone has any objections. 
So, as of #14171, general redo suport should be practical to implement. The whiteboard is another matter, and may need its own undo/redo buttons.
Im gonna do it

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Reviewer.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Undo.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/analytics/UsageAnalytics.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/CustomButtonsSettingsFragment.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/reviewer/ActionButtonStatus.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/libanki/Collection.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/ui/RtlCompliantActionProvider.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/drawable/ic_redo.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/menu/reviewer.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/01-core.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_custom_buttons.xml`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality
